overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The path runs between a rocky cliff wall on the left and grassy vegetation on the right in a remote natural setting. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine.

narrow dirt trail illuminated by the flashlight beam
dark silhouetted rocks visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. A rocky cliff wall rises immediately on the left while a grassy slope descends on the right. The path continues forward into darkness with distant rock formations barely visible ahead. No other agents or significant events occur during this continuous forward movement through the remote natural terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded dirt trail at night, maintaining a steady pace through a narrow natural corridor. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness, illuminating the immediate path between a towering rocky cliff on the left and a descending grassy slope on the right. As the camera advances, the light catches the rough textures of the stone wall and the surrounding vegetation, guiding the way deeper into the remote terrain. The scene then extends forward into the void, where the beam gradually reveals distant, jagged rock formations emerging from the shadows ahead.
